description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a dark navy blue and white color scheme. The shoes have a synthetic or leather upper with white side stripes and branding details, including a logo and text on the outer side and heel. The laces are white and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the shoes have a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The soles are slightly translucent and show signs of wear, with some discoloration and scuffing visible along the edges. The overall silhouette is streamlined, suitable for casual or sporty urban use. The shoes appear to be lightly used, with minor creasing and dirt on the uppers and soles.
description: A pair of navy blue and white low-top sneakers with white laces, side stripes, and visible branding, showing light signs of wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel area, white padded collars, and blue heel tabs with a blue logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white side stripes, branding text, and logo on the outer side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the toe boxes, white laces, and the overall width of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side stripes, branding, and the overall profile of the shoes.
attribute_logo: Blue shield-like logo with 'UL' initials on the heel and a crest with text on the outer side.
